content:
{
  "artifact_type": "srx_ace_v3_agent",
  "depth_tier": "D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE",
  "runtime_target": "Codex",
  "should_block": false,
  "blocked_reason": null,
  "compiled_intent": {
    "Objective": "Build an SRX ACE v3 agent for a content system that processes schema_blur chaos input, producing governed artifacts with explicit validation gates, compilable by SR8 into objective, scope, constraints, success criteria, and output contract.",
    "Scope": "The agent must handle messy, incomplete, urgent, and ambiguous input from a founder_operator in Canada, using the runtime_lens to resolve schema_blur. Output must be a structured artifact with validation gates and SR8-compilable sections.",
    "Constraints": [
      "Must operate within Canadian legal and regulatory frameworks (e.g., PIPEDA for data privacy).",
      "Must not produce harmful, misleading, or non-compliant content.",
      "Must include explicit validation gates for each output section.",
      "Must handle schema_blur by inferring missing context and resolving ambiguities without hallucination."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "Agent produces a governed artifact with all required SR8 sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.",
      "Validation gates are explicitly defined and pass for each section.",
      "Artifact is compilable by SR8 without errors.",
      "Agent correctly processes schema_blur input and returns a coherent, actionable output."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "format": "JSON",
      "sections": [
        "artifact_type",
        "depth_tier",
        "runtime_target",
        "should_block",
        "blocked_reason",
        "compiled_intent"
      ],
      "compiled_intent_sections": [
        "Objective",
        "Scope",
        "Constraints",
        "Success Criteria",
        "Output Contract"
      ],
      "validation_gates": [
        "Gate 1: Input schema_blur resolved - confirm all required fields present or inferred.",
        "Gate 2: Legal compliance check - ensure no violation of Canadian laws.",
        "Gate 3: Constraint adherence - verify all constraints are met.",
        "Gate 4: Success criteria validation - confirm all criteria satisfied.",
        "Gate 5: Output contract completeness - ensure all sections present and compilable."
      ]
    }
  }
}
